positive: A vibrant, stylized portrait of a majestic space otter wearing a retro-futuristic astronaut helmet, floating among nebula clouds and Saturn-ringed planets. Pop art influence, highly saturated colors, bold outlines, cinematic lighting.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, realistic fur, grayscale, muted colors, boring
